title: A Day Out at the San Francisco Botanical Garden - Jupiter Hadley
content: # A Day Out at the San Francisco Botanical Garden. One of the places that Dann was most excited for was the San Francisco Botanical Gardens, which is a huge gardens and green space with plants from all over the world! There are maps there too, which you can grab for free, that showcase the area and the different gardens. We walked around for quite some time, exploring all of the different flowers and plants there was. I love the idea of having a moon viewing platform in a garden – and it’s a really unique feature that I had not seen before at the other gardens that we have visited in London! This area was completely different from other aspects of the gardens – which is something super unique about the San Francisco Botanical Gardens – each area felt like a different biome from the other. The San Francisco Botanical Gardens is a place you can easily spend a few hours at, walking around and enjoying the plants around you.
